scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.situation: 베를린의 상징적인 문 앞에서 사진을 찍는다
scenes.npcDialog: Das ist das Brandenburger Tor! This gate symbolizes German reunification. Would you like a photo in front of it?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 브란덴부르크 문이에요! 독일 통일의 상징이죠. 앞에서 사진 찍어드릴까요?

choices.text: Yes, please! It's more impressive than I imagined.
Can you tell me more about its history?

scenes.npcDialog: Döner Kebab was invented here in Berlin! Lamb or chicken? With everything and extra garlic sauce?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 되너 케밥은 베를린에서 시작됐어요! 양고기 아님 치킨? 모든 재료에 마늘 소스 추가요?

choices.text: Lamb with everything, please! Extra sauce sounds great.
I didn't know Döner was from Berlin!
I only eat American fast food.

scenes.npcDialog: Friedrichstraße is great for shopping! From luxury brands to local boutiques. The French Quarter nearby has lovely cafes too.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 프리드리히슈트라세는 쇼핑 좋아요! 명품부터 현지 부티크까지. 근처 프렌치 쿼터 카페도 좋아요.

choices.text: I'd love to explore both areas!
Shopping streets are all the same.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Are you here to register for our English program?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to enroll in the intermediate course.
What courses do you offer for beginners?

scenes.npcDialog: We have a study group meeting after class. Want to join?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 수업 후에 스터디 그룹 모임 있어요. 참가하실래요?

choices.text: Yes! What topic are you studying?
Sounds great! What time does it start?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a student monthly pass?
Good evening! Your room is ready. Would you like an upgrade to a suite for 50 euros more?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 안녕하세요! 객실 준비되었습니다. 50유로 추가하시면 스위트룸으로 업그레이드 가능한데요?

choices.text: That sounds nice. What does the suite include?
What's the difference between the rooms?
Give me the upgrade for free.

scenes.npcDialog: The regular line is about 2 hours. Would you like skip-the-line tickets?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 일반 줄은 약 2시간 기다려야 해요. 줄 안서는 티켓 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, how much extra is it?
Definitely, I don't want to wait.
I should get VIP for free.

scenes.npcDialog: This section of the Wall remains as a memorial. The East Side Gallery has amazing murals. Have you seen the famous 'Fraternal Kiss' painting?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 이 구간의 장벽이 기념관으로 남아있어요. 이스트 사이드 갤러리에 멋진 벽화가 있어요. '형제의 키스' 그림 보셨어요?

choices.text: Not yet! Where can I find it?
The history here is so moving.

scenes.npcDialog: KaDeWe's food hall is spectacular! Six floors of gourmet paradise. The rooftop restaurant has amazing views too.
scenes.npcDialogKo: KaDeWe 식품관은 장관이에요! 6층에 걸친 미식 천국이죠. 옥상 레스토랑 전망도 끝내줘요.

choices.text: Six floors of food? I have to see this!
Can you recommend the best floor to visit?
Department stores are all the same.

scenes.npcDialog: The TV Tower offers 360-degree views of Berlin! On a clear day, you can see 40km. There's also a revolving restaurant.
scenes.npcDialogKo: TV 타워에서 베를린 360도 전망을 볼 수 있어요! 맑은 날에는 40km까지 보여요. 회전 레스토랑도 있어요.

choices.text: How long is the wait for the elevator?
It's not worth the ticket price.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you prefer morning or afternoon classes?

choices.text: Morning classes would be better for me.
What time do afternoon classes start?
I don't want to wake up early.

scenes.npcDialog: The homework is due on Friday. Any questions?

choices.text: Should we work in groups or individually?
Can I email it or should I print it?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the dormitory. Here's your room key.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 기숙사에 오신 것을 환영해요. 방 열쇠예요.

choices.text: Thank you! Where's the common room?

scenes.npcDialog: How may I assist you this evening?

choices.text: Could you recommend a nice restaurant nearby?
Can you make a reservation for me?
You should know what I want.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to book a spa treatment?

choices.text: Yes, what massage options do you have?
I'd like a 60-minute deep tissue massage.
Spas are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Currywurst mit Pommes? Our secret curry sauce recipe is 50 years old! Extra spicy or regular?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 커리부르스트에 감자튀김요? 저희 커리 소스 비법은 50년 됐어요! 매운맛 아님 보통맛?

choices.text: Regular please! This is my first time trying it.
I'll try extra spicy! I love spicy food.

scenes.npcDialog: This area was completely destroyed in WWII and rebuilt after reunification. The Sony Center architecture is stunning!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 이 지역은 2차 세계대전에 완전히 파괴되었다가 통일 후 재건되었어요. 소니 센터 건축이 멋져요!

choices.text: The contrast between old and new is fascinating.
Where can I learn more about the reconstruction?

scenes.npcDialog: Sundays at Mauerpark are magical! Flea market, karaoke in the amphitheater, street food. Pure Berlin vibes!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 일요일 마우어파크는 마법이에요! 벼룩시장, 야외 가라오케, 길거리 음식. 진짜 베를린 분위기!

choices.text: This sounds like the authentic Berlin experience!
Karaoke in the amphitheater? I have to see that!
Flea markets are just old junk.

scenes.npcDialog: Let me explain our house rules. Quiet time starts at 10 PM.

choices.text: I understand. What about having friends over?

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you today?

choices.text: I'm having trouble with pronunciation. Any tips?
Could you recommend some extra exercises?

scenes.npcDialog: We're organizing a cultural trip this weekend. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 이번 주말에 문화 여행이 있어요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Sounds fun! How do I sign up?

scenes.npcDialog: Room service, how may I help you?

choices.text: I'd like to order breakfast for tomorrow morning.
Could I get a bottle of wine sent up?
Bring me everything on the menu.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you visiting from abroad? You may be eligible for tax refund.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 해외에서 오셨나요? 택스 리펀 받으실 수 있어요.

choices.text: Yes, how do I get the tax refund?
Can you prepare the documents for me?
Just give me the discount now.

scenes.npcDialog: The Pergamon Altar is breathtaking! Museum Island has 5 world-class museums. Which one would you like to visit first?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 페르가몬 제단은 정말 멋져요! 박물관 섬에는 5개의 세계적인 박물관이 있어요. 어디부터 가실래요?

choices.text: The Pergamon Museum! I want to see the Ishtar Gate.
Is there a combined ticket for all museums?

scenes.npcDialog: This is the longest remaining section of the Wall - 1.3km of murals! Artists from around the world painted here after reunification.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 장벽 중 가장 긴 구간이에요 - 1.3km의 벽화가 있어요! 통일 후 전세계 예술가들이 그렸어요.

choices.text: Which mural is the most famous?

scenes.npcDialog: Kreuzberg is Berlin's coolest neighborhood! Street art everywhere, amazing Turkish food, and the best coffee shops.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 크로이츠베르크는 베를린에서 가장 힙한 동네예요! 거리 예술, 터키 음식, 최고의 커피숍!

choices.text: This neighborhood has such great energy!
Where's the best coffee shop around here?
It looks too hipster for me.

scenes.npcDialog: How was your first day at school?

choices.text: It was great! The teachers are really nice.
A bit nervous, but I think I'll enjoy it.
I don't want to talk about it.

scenes.npcDialog: How are you finding your current class level?

choices.text: It's a bit easy. Can I move to a higher level?
I think I need a slower-paced class.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you interested in language exchange?

choices.text: Yes! I can teach Korean if someone helps me with English.
That sounds great! How does it work?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to business class check-in. May I see your passport?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스 클래스 체크인에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 여권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Is the lounge open now?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the lounge. May I see your boarding pass?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 라운지에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 탑승권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Where are the showers?
Is there a quiet area to work?

scenes.npcDialog: You need a Tageskarte for unlimited daily travel. Validate your ticket before boarding! Inspectors give heavy fines.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 하루 무제한 이용은 타게스카르테가 필요해요. 승차 전에 티켓 꼭 개찰하세요! 검표원이 큰 벌금 물려요.

choices.text: Where do I validate the ticket?
I'll take a day pass, please.
I'll just ride without a ticket.

scenes.npcDialog: Willkommen! Try our Wiener Schnitzel with potato salad. And of course, a fresh Berliner Weisse - it's Berlin's signature beer!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 비엔나 슈니첼에 감자 샐러드 드세요. 그리고 베를리너 바이세 - 베를린 대표 맥주예요!

choices.text: Schnitzel and local beer sounds perfect!

scenes.situation: 독일 연방의회 건물과 유리 돔을 방문한다
scenes.npcDialog: The glass dome represents transparency in democracy. You need to register online for free entry. The views are spectacular!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 유리 돔은 민주주의의 투명성을 상징해요. 무료 입장은 온라인 사전 등록 필요해요. 전망 끝내줘요!

choices.text: I registered online! Can't wait to see the dome.
The symbolism of the glass dome is brilliant.
I don't want to register anywhere.

scenes.npcDialog: Let me show you around. Here's the cafeteria.

choices.text: Great! Is there a library too?
Where can I find the computer lab?

scenes.npcDialog: Congratulations on completing the course! Would you like your certificate?

choices.text: Yes, please! Can I get an official one with a stamp?
Thank you! Will it show my final grade?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening. Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, reservation for Kim at 7 PM.
I booked a table for two.

scenes.npcDialog: Here's your rental car. Would you like additional insurance coverage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 렌터카 여기 있습니다. 추가 보험 들으시겠어요?

choices.text: What does the full coverage include?
Yes, I'd like the comprehensive insurance.

scenes.situation: 세계적으로 유명한 베를린 클럽 문화를 체험한다
scenes.npcDialog: Berlin's club scene is legendary! Berghain is famous but hard to get in. Want me to recommend some alternatives?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 베를린 클럽 씬은 전설이에요! 베르그하인은 유명하지만 들어가기 어려워요. 다른 곳 추천해드릴까요?

choices.text: Yes, please! What are some good alternatives?
What's the dress code for clubs here?

scenes.npcDialog: The Memorial to the Murdered Jews of Europe is deeply moving. Please walk through the stelae in silence and reflect.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 유럽 학살 유대인 추모비는 정말 감동적이에요. 조용히 비석 사이를 걸으며 묵념해주세요.

choices.text: This is an important place to remember history.

scenes.npcDialog: Berlin is a melting pot of cuisines! Vietnamese, Middle Eastern, Korean - you can find anything here. What are you in the mood for?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 베를린은 다양한 요리의 용광로예요! 베트남, 중동, 한국 음식 - 다 있어요. 뭐 드시고 싶으세요?

choices.text: I'd love to try something I can't get back home.
I only eat food I know.

scenes.npcDialog: Need any help finding study materials?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 학습 자료 찾는 거 도움 필요하세요?

choices.text: Yes, where are the English grammar books?
How long can I borrow books for?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you here to open an account?

choices.text: Yes, I'm a student here. What documents do I need?
I need an account for my study abroad expenses.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to try our tasting menu with wine pairing?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 와인 페어링과 함께하는 테이스팅 메뉴 드셔보시겠어요?

choices.text: That sounds wonderful. What wines are included?
Yes, please. Is there a vegetarian option?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like valet parking for your vehicle?

choices.text: Yes, please. How much is it per day?
Valet parking is for lazy people.

scenes.npcDialog: This was the famous crossing point between East and West Berlin. The museum nearby tells incredible escape stories.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 동베를린과 서베를린 사이 유명한 검문소였어요. 근처 박물관에 놀라운 탈출 이야기가 있어요.

choices.text: I'd love to learn about the escape stories!
Is the museum included in the museum pass?
This looks like a tourist trap.
Cold War stuff is old news.

scenes.npcDialog: Tiergarten is Berlin's Central Park! You can rent a boat at the lake or grab a beer at the garden cafes.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 티어가르텐은 베를린의 센트럴파크예요! 호수에서 보트 빌리거나 가든 카페에서 맥주 마실 수 있어요.

choices.text: Perfect weather for a walk in the park.

scenes.npcDialog: We need to take your photo for the student ID.

choices.text: Okay, when will the card be ready?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a phone plan?

choices.text: Yes, I'm here for 6 months. What are my options?
Do you have any student plans?

scenes.npcDialog: Shall I call a taxi for you, or would you prefer to use the app?

choices.text: Please call a taxi. I'm going to the opera house.
I'll use the app. What's the address here?
I'll walk... no, actually drive me.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to deliver your luggage directly to your hotel?

choices.text: That would be great! How long does it take?
Yes, what time will it arrive?
Why would I pay for that?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you a student? We offer 50% off.

choices.text: That's great! One student ticket please.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with something?

choices.text: Are you hiring? I'm a student looking for part-time work.
I saw your job posting. Is the position still open?
I don't really want to work.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a private guide for your city tour?

choices.text: Yes, can the guide speak Korean?
How much is a private half-day tour?

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
